task_completion.description: Date and time are set to November 15, 2024, at 15:00 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium date/time window or bottom toolbar displays '2024-11-15' and '15:00'.

task_completion.description: Atmosphere and ground are disabled in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sky background is completely black (no atmospheric scattering or blue sky) and there is no landscape or ground texture blocking the lower half of the view.

task_completion.description: Azimuthal grid is enabled in Stellarium.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A grid of circular and radiating lines (azimuthal grid) is clearly overlaid on the sky map.

task_completion.description: Moon is centered in the view from the Tokyo perspective.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium view showing the Moon centered and selected. The location text (usually at the bottom toolbar or in the location window) must indicate 'Tokyo'.

task_completion.description: Moon is centered in the view from the London perspective.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium view showing the Moon centered and selected. The location text (usually at the bottom toolbar or in the location window) must indicate 'London'.

task_completion.description: Log file eme_sked_nov15.txt is created with the required contact details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/eme_sked_nov15.txt, which must explicitly include the words 'Moon', '15:00', 'Tokyo', and 'London'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Stellarium GUI to verify visibility.
integrity.visual_evidence: Stellarium application window is visible in the screenshots, showing actual interaction (e.g., location window open, search window used) rather than just viewing static images.

integrity.description: Screenshots are taken from the simulated environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The views of the Moon include Stellarium's UI elements (like the top-left information text about the Moon, or the bottom toolbar) proving they are from the software.

integrity.description: Agent did not just copy-paste the task description into the log file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The log file contains a formatted entry or specific extracted details (Moon, 15:00, Tokyo, London) rather than a direct copy-paste of the entire prompt text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target time: 15:00 UTC. Log file path: /home/ga/Desktop/eme_sked_nov15.txt. Screenshots must be saved to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium. London coordinates: ~51.51 N (0.899 rad), ~0.13 W (-0.0023 rad).
